name: Brooklyn Bardwell
ai_summary: Brooklyn Bardwell has over a decade of childcare experience starting at age 12, including work with autistic children in therapy settings in San Tan Valley, AZ. She shows practical conflict resolution skills and expresses strong passion for child development, available for full-time positions.
